mechanics.excerpt: Combat Sense: Characters with the Combat Sense Trait reduce the delaying modifier to +1_ Combat Paralysis: Characters with the Combat Paralysis Trait increase the delaying modifier to +3. Initiative Modifiers The following skills, traits and effects modify character" Initiative roll or score as indicated Fatigue: character who has suffered Fatigue see Fatigue_ P: 115) subtracts the number of Fatigue points he has suffered from the Initiative result.
